classification.reason: Procmon on 2026-03-14 captured rundll32.exe launching mmsys.cpl and reading ShowDisconnectedDevices with both 1 and 0, Ghidra on 2026-03-26 decompiled the mmsys.cpl handlers that read and write the same DeviceCpl flag, and the app writes the same show-disconnected state with a clean restore story. The 2026-03-27 v3.1 runtime lane adds an explicit missing -> 1 -> missing VM cycle with a control-panel launch, WPR placeholder trace, and healthy shell recovery, but the class basis still rests on the existing Procmon plus Ghidra convergence.
